action_set_definitions.name: get_current_environment_state
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current telemetry from the renewable energy system, including battery SOC, market pricing, and net load data. This must be called at the start of each decision cycle.

action_set_definitions.name: execute_dispatch_action
action_set_definitions.description: Submits the power dispatch commands for the current 15-minute (0.25h) interval. This updates the battery state and manages renewable curtailment to meet grid constraints.

battery_charge_kw.description: The power rate for the battery in kW. Positive values represent charging (absorbing energy); negative values represent discharging. Must respect calculated power limits based on SOC.

curtailment_kw.description: The amount of renewable power to intentionally shed (kW) to prevent grid injection during prohibited periods when the battery is unable to absorb the surplus.

state_description.timestamp: The current simulation time in ISO 8601 format.
state_description.battery_soc_kwh: Current energy stored in the Battery Energy Storage System (BESS) in kWh.
state_description.net_load_mw: Current demand minus non-controllable renewable generation in Megawatts.
state_description.grid_buy_price: The current cost to purchase 1 MWh from the main grid.
state_description.grid_sell_price: The current revenue for exporting 1 MWh to the main grid.
state_description.weather_irradiance: Current solar irradiance (W/m^2) affecting PV generation.
state_description.cumulative_operational_cost: Total financial cost incurred since the start of the simulation episode.
